name: Mosaic ImmunoEngineering Inc.
summary: Business Overview We are a development-stage biotechnology company focused on advancing and eventually commercializing immunotherapies for the treatment of cancer. We have historically advanced early-stage product candidates and we are pursuing new product candidates and platforms to build a product pipeline based on our deep understanding of immunotherapies.
